_comment: C3 — bind the harness controls to a real OSCAL catalog. Copy to oscal-catalog.json and fill in once the auditors' standard is known. This example uses SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria ids; swap for ISO 27001 (A.x.x) or FedRAMP (NIST 800-53 AC-x etc.) as needed. Precedence: by_id wins over by_axis; a control in neither is emitted UNMAPPED, never invented.
